title: Complete a daily study loop from learning plan to quiz and back with progress updated
description: Verifies a learner can start from the learning plan, complete a quiz, and return to the learning plan with updated completion and accuracy shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /lernplan
Click the suggested next step in today’s learning focus
Select a learning unit to start studying
Select an answer for the current quiz question
Submit the quiz attempt
Navigate back to the learning plan
Verify overall progress indicators reflect an update from the completed attempt
Verify an accuracy or correctness metric is displayed and updated

title: Complete an exam and view results with recommended next steps
description: Verifies a learner can select an exam type, complete the exam questions in the quiz view, submit, and then see results and recommended next steps.

steps.description: Navigate to /exam
Select an exam type
Start the selected exam
Answer the presented exam questions with valid selections
Submit the exam
Verify exam results are displayed
Verify recommended next steps are displayed

title: Follow today's learning focus to complete a unit and see progress increment
description: Verifies that using the today’s learning focus leads to a study unit and completing it increments progress when returning to the learning plan.

steps.description: Navigate to /lernplan
Click the today’s learning focus entry
Select the suggested unit to begin
Select an answer for each question in the unit until completion is available
Submit the completed unit
Navigate back to the learning plan
Verify the suggested next step changes or advances after completion
Verify completion percentage for the relevant module increases

title: Complete a practice question set and view score and accuracy
description: Verifies a learner can complete a practice quiz, submit answers, and see score and accuracy metrics in the results view.

steps.description: Navigate to /quiz
Begin a practice question set
Answer each question with a valid selection
Submit the answers
Verify a score is displayed
Verify accuracy metrics are displayed

title: Complete TikTok qualification and register to reach a personalized dashboard
description: Verifies a TikTok lead can complete qualification, view social proof, register, and land on a dashboard personalized by onboarding answers.

steps.description: Navigate to /tiktok
Answer the employment qualification questions with valid selections
Continue to the social proof or testimonials step
Proceed to registration from the onboarding flow
Fill a valid email into the registration form
Fill a valid password into the registration form
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify the dashboard shows a personalized onboarding-based starting state

title: Registration validation errors shown and cleared during TikTok onboarding
description: Verifies submitting an incomplete registration form shows validation guidance and a corrected resubmission reaches the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /tiktok
Proceed through qualification to reach the registration step
Submit the registration form without completing required fields
Verify validation errors or guidance are displayed for missing required inputs
Fill a valid email into the registration form
Fill a valid password into the registration form
Resubmit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Exam configuration changes when switching exam type before starting
description: Verifies switching between Mini/Written/Simulation changes the exam setup shown and the chosen type is reflected when starting the exam.

steps.description: Navigate to /exam
Select the Mini exam type
Verify the exam configuration details for the selected type are displayed
Select a different exam type
Start the selected exam
Verify the quiz reflects the newly selected exam format (e.g., structure or timing indicators)

title: Navigate from learning plan to module list and open a specific module context
description: Verifies a learner can use the learning plan to reach the module list and open a module/unit context without losing the intended study target.

steps.description: Navigate to /lernplan
Click a module or upcoming item from the learning plan
Navigate to the module list view
Select the module associated with the chosen learning plan item
Verify the module overview or module detail context is displayed for the selected module
Verify an option to start or continue studying within the module is available

title: View account and subscription details on profile
description: Verifies an authenticated user can access the profile page and see account information and subscription status.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation to open the profile page
Verify account details are displayed
Verify subscription status/details are displayed

title: Browse modules and start a practice session from a module overview
description: Verifies a learner can browse modules, open a module overview, start practice, complete a session, and see progress updated on return.

steps.description: Navigate to /learn
Select a module from the module list to open its overview
Start a practice session from the module overview
Select an answer for the current quiz question
Submit the practice session
Navigate back to the module list
Verify the studied module shows updated progress compared to before the session
Verify a continue or next-step state is available for that module

title: Persist answers while navigating between questions in a quiz
description: Verifies selected answers remain saved when moving between questions before submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /quiz
Begin a practice question set
Answer the current question with a valid selection
Navigate to a different question
Navigate back to the previously answered question
Verify the previously selected answer remains selected

title: Update profile fields and see changes reflected
description: Verifies an authenticated user can edit profile fields, save, and see the updated profile reflected on the profile page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation to open the profile page
Fill updated valid values into editable profile fields
Save profile changes
Verify a save confirmation is visible
Verify the updated profile values are displayed on the profile page

title: Find a topic by filtering/scanning and begin the Introduction unit
description: Verifies a learner can locate a topic in the module list and begin the Introduction unit from the module hierarchy.

steps.description: Navigate to /learn
Use the available filtering or scanning controls to narrow to a topic
Select a module from the filtered results
Review the module hierarchy sections
Begin the Introduction unit
Verify the quiz or study view opens for the Introduction unit
Verify the current unit context indicates the learner is in the module’s Introduction section

title: Learning plan displays meaningful empty or initial state for a new learner
description: Verifies that a new or unstarted learner sees an initial/empty state on the learning plan with clear next actions available.

steps.description: Navigate to /lernplan
Verify an initial or empty progress state is displayed
Verify a clear call-to-action to start learning or pick a module is available

title: Restarting an exam returns the user to the exam selection flow
description: Verifies a learner can exit the current exam attempt and start a new one from the exam selection page.

steps.description: Navigate to /exam
Select an exam type
Start the selected exam
Initiate restarting or leaving the exam attempt via available in-app controls
Select a different exam type
Start the selected exam
Verify the quiz reflects the newly selected exam format

title: Review social proof in TikTok onboarding and continue the funnel
description: Verifies that social proof/testimonials are reachable in the onboarding funnel and the user can continue onward without blockers.

steps.description: Navigate to /tiktok
Answer the qualification questions with valid selections
Continue to the social proof or testimonials step
Verify social proof or testimonials content is displayed
Continue from social proof to the next step
Verify the flow advances to a registration or next onboarding step

title: Refresh the learning plan and retain visible progress state
description: Verifies that after completing a quiz and returning to the learning plan, a page refresh retains the visible progress state.

steps.description: Navigate to /lernplan
Click the suggested next step in today’s learning focus
Select a learning unit to start studying
Select an answer for the current quiz question
Submit the quiz attempt
Navigate back to the learning plan
Refresh the page
Verify progress indicators are still displayed after refresh
Verify the learning plan still shows a suggested next step

title: Prevent submitting a quiz with required questions unanswered
description: Verifies the quiz prevents submission when required questions are incomplete and shows a validation prompt to complete missing answers.

steps.description: Navigate to /quiz
Begin a practice question set
Attempt to submit without answering at least one required question
Verify a validation error is visible indicating required answers are missing

title: Correct invalid profile input and save successfully
description: Verifies a user can correct invalid inputs after validation errors and then save profile changes successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation to open the profile page
Fill an invalid value into a constrained profile field
Attempt to save profile changes
Fill a valid value into the same profile field
Save profile changes
Verify a save confirmation is visible

title: Show field validation errors for invalid profile input
description: Verifies invalid profile edits are rejected with field-level validation errors and do not save.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation to open the profile page
Fill an invalid value into a profile field that has format constraints
Attempt to save profile changes
Verify field-level validation errors are visible
